initial_contact.template: Hi {{firstName}}! Thanks for your interest in growing {{companyName}}'s online ordering. I can show you exactly how we help restaurants increase direct orders 40%+ and cut third-party fees. Got 15 min this week? Reply YES and I'll send my calendar link. - {{senderFirstName}}

qualified_high_score.template: {{firstName}}, I just reviewed your info - {{companyName}} is a perfect fit for our restaurant tech. Based on your current volume, we could save you $2-3K/month in fees alone. Can we talk tomorrow? Reply with a good time. - {{senderFirstName}}

follow_up_day_3.template: {{firstName}}, following up on our restaurant tech solution. Quick question: are you currently using DoorDash/Uber Eats? Most restaurants don't realize they're losing 30% to fees. 5-min call to show you the numbers? - {{senderFirstName}}
follow_up_day_3.trigger: 3 days after initial contact, no response

initial_contact.template: Hi {{firstName}}! Thanks for connecting about {{companyName}}'s growth. We help tech/SaaS companies automate their sales pipeline and close 40% faster. Interested in seeing how? Reply YES for my calendar. - {{senderFirstName}}
initial_contact.trigger: New lead created, industry contains 'tech' or 'software' or 'saas'

qualified_high_score.template: {{firstName}}, just saw {{companyName}} is looking to scale sales. Perfect timing - we just helped TechStart SF increase their close rate from 18% to 27% with automation. Quick call tomorrow? - {{senderFirstName}}

initial_contact.template: Hi {{firstName}}! Thanks for your interest. We help professional service firms like {{companyName}} automate client acquisition and nurturing. I'd love to show you our approach. Reply YES for a quick intro call this week. - {{senderFirstName}}
initial_contact.trigger: New lead created, industry = professional services/consulting/legal/accounting

initial_contact.template: Hi {{firstName}}! Saw {{companyName}} is in ecommerce. We specialize in automating abandoned cart recovery, post-purchase sequences, and review generation. Average client sees 25% revenue lift in 60 days. Interested? Reply YES. - {{senderFirstName}}
initial_contact.trigger: New lead created, industry contains 'ecommerce' or 'retail' or 'online store'

initial_contact.template: Hi {{firstName}}! Thanks for connecting about {{companyName}}. I help businesses automate their sales and marketing so you can focus on growth. Quick 15-min call to see if we're a fit? Reply YES for my calendar. - {{senderFirstName}}
initial_contact.trigger: New lead created, industry not matched to specific template

form_completed.template: {{firstName}}, thanks for completing our ROI calculator! Based on your numbers, you could save ${{projectedSavings}}/month with automation. Let's discuss - reply YES for my next available slot. - {{senderFirstName}}

webinar_registered.template: {{firstName}}, you're registered for our {{webinarTopic}} webinar on {{webinarDate}}! I'll send the Zoom link 1 hour before. In the meantime, any specific questions you want me to cover? - {{senderFirstName}}

demo_no_show.template: {{firstName}}, we missed you on our call today. No worries - things come up! Want to reschedule? I have slots open tomorrow and Thursday. Reply with your preference. - {{senderFirstName}}
demo_no_show.trigger: Scheduled demo, attendee didn't join within 10 minutes

proposal_sent.template: {{firstName}}, just sent your proposal for {{companyName}}. Check your email. I'm around for the next hour if you want to discuss - just call {{senderPhone}} or reply here. - {{senderFirstName}}

day_7_check_in.template: {{firstName}}, checking in! Have you had a chance to review the info I sent about automating {{companyName}}'s sales? Any questions I can answer? - {{senderFirstName}}
day_7_check_in.trigger: 7 days after initial contact, no response

day_14_value_add.template: {{firstName}}, just published a case study on how we helped a company like {{companyName}} increase conversions 40%. Want me to send it over? Might give you some ideas. Reply YES. - {{senderFirstName}}
day_14_value_add.trigger: 14 days after initial contact, no response

day_30_final_attempt.template: {{firstName}}, last message from me! If you're ever ready to explore automating {{companyName}}'s sales, I'm just a text away. Otherwise, I wish you nothing but success! - {{senderFirstName}}
day_30_final_attempt.trigger: 30 days after initial contact, no response

inactive_lead.template: {{firstName}}, it's been a while! {{companyName}} came to mind when we launched our new Quick Start package - full automation in 48 hours. Thought you might be interested. Reply SHOW ME if you want details. - {{senderFirstName}}
inactive_lead.trigger: Lead went cold (60+ days no activity), new product launch

past_customer.template: {{firstName}}! Hope {{companyName}} is crushing it. Quick question - would you be open to a 10-min call about our new AI lead scoring? It's a game-changer. Reply YES if interested. - {{senderFirstName}}
past_customer.trigger: Past customer (churned 6-12 months ago), new feature launch

YES.template: Perfect! Here's my calendar: {{calendarLink}} - grab any slot that works for you. Looking forward to it! - {{senderFirstName}}

NOT_INTERESTED.template: No problem, {{firstName}}! If things change, you know where to find me. Best of luck with {{companyName}}! - {{senderFirstName}}

MORE_INFO.template: Great question! I just sent you an email with all the details and pricing. Should be in your inbox now. Let me know if you don't see it! - {{senderFirstName}}
MORE_INFO.trigger: Lead replies with questions or 'more info', 'pricing', 'details'

timing.5_minute_rule: New leads have highest response rate within 5 minutes of inquiry

content.personalization: Always use first name, company name when available

required: Only contact leads who provided phone number
compliance.tcpa_compliance: Must have prior express written consent for marketing SMS

response_handling.escalate_to_human: If conversation becomes complex or lead is hot (score >= 80)
response_handling.track_all: Log every SMS to communications table in Supabase

available_variables.name: projectedSavings
available_variables.source: Calculated from form submissions or lead data

error_handling: Invalid phone number: Skip send, flag lead record
Twilio API error: Retry after 30 seconds, max 3 attempts
Opt-out detected: Add to suppression list, never contact again
Rate limit hit: Queue message for next send window

kpis: Response rate (% of SMS that get replies)
